ModMetaData.name: LxO - Smart Allow
ModMetaData.author: Lexxers
ModMetaData.description:
Automatically allows forbidden items with smart per-category filtering.
By default, all dropped items are auto-allowed. Open mod settings to configure which categories to exclude -- drugs, weapons, apparel, food, or anything else.
Items forbidden during active combat are held until combat ends, then auto-allowed based on your rules. Double-forbid an item to permanently keep it forbidden.
No dependencies. No performance impact. Just works.
